prepared_text:
November 14, 2024 
 
 
 
BSE Limited  
Department of Corporate Relationship 
1st Floor, New Trade Ring, Rotunda Building 
Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers  
Dalal Street, Mumbai- 400001 
Scrip Code: 524742                                                   
National Stock Exchange of India Ltd., 
Department of Corporate Services 
Exchange Plaza, 5th Floor, 
C-1, Block G,Bandra Kurla Complex, 
Bandra (E),Mumbai – 400 051 
Scrip Code: CAPLIPOINT.                                          
 
  Dear Sir / Madam, 
 
Sub : Transcript of the Earnings Call – Q2 – FY 2024 – 25  
 
In continuation of our letter dated October 30, 2024 and pursuant to Regulation 30(6) of the SEBI 
(Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, the transcript of the 
presentation made on Thursday, November 07, 2024, on financial performance of the Company for 
the quarter and half year ended September 30, 2024, is available on the Company’s website at 
https://www.caplinpoint.net/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/DolatCap-CaplinPoint-Nov07-2024.pdf 
 
 
 
Kindly take the same on your records. 
 
 
Sincerely Yours  
For Caplin Point Laboratories Limited 
 
 
 
Venkatram G 
General Counsel & Company Secretary 
Membership No. A23989 
 
 
 
 
 
                                                                                                        
 
 
 
VENKATRAM 
GANAPATHISUBRA
MANIAN
Digitally signed by VENKATRAM 
GANAPATHISUBRAMANIAN 
Date: 2024.11.14 11:26:44 
+05'30'
